product: Metric view parameters are now in Public Preview
tagline: You can now define parameters in metric views to bind values at query time, serving many query variants from a single definition instead of maintaining a separate metric view per variant.
what_it_does: You can now define parameters in metric views to bind values at query time, serving many query variants from a single definition instead of maintaining a separate metric view per variant. Parameters let you pass values into a metric view when you query it. Use parameters to reuse a single metric view definition across different inputs, such as a discount rate or a date window.
key_takeaway: You can now define parameters in metric views to bind values at query time, serving many query variants from a single definition instead of maintaining a separate metric view per variant.
